name: Jeffrey Teo
title: Country Director
role_label: Country Director, Regional Markets (SG · MY · ID)
bio: Jeffrey leads AKA Digital's regional strategy and partnerships across Southeast Asia and Korea. With over a decade in B2B MarTech, he has helped 150+ enterprise brands unlock growth through data-driven marketing technology.

name: Ms. Phuong Pham (Masie)
title: Country Director
bio: Masie leads business development and client partnerships across Vietnam, managing AKA Digital's exclusive platform relationships and enterprise client portfolio.

name: Mr. KS Hwang
title: Country Director
bio: KS leads AKA Digital's Korea operations, bridging Korean enterprise brands with SEA market entry and MarTech implementation.
